The '''Berserkers''' and '''Advanced Berserkers''' were a caste of vicious [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] warriors armed with two [[Ryyk blade/Legends|Ryyk blades]] or [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcasters]].<ref name="TFU CG">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==History==
[[File:Wookiee_Berserker.jpg|left|thumb|A Wookiee Berserker.]]
After the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established control of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and began enslaving [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], Berserkers began to fight Imperial Forces, with an ultimate goal of liberating their homeworld, fueling their single-minded fighting fervor with rage at what the Empire had done with them, their planet and their people. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Berserker groups remained in hiding due to the Empire's [[High Human Culture/Legends|Human High Culture]].<ref name="TFU CG" /> They typically entered battle wielding two extremely large [[Ryyk blade/Legends|Ryyk blades]],<ref name="SW:GB" /> although they could also use bowcasters as ranged weapons,<ref name="TFU CG" /> and were equipped with light armor for maximum mobility on the battlefield. Advanced Berserkers from [[Ittummi]] were used to great effect during the latter parts of [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|liberation]] of Kashyyyk. Six Advanced Berserkers joined in the raid on [[Avatar Orbital Platform]].<ref name="SW:GB" /> Legendary stories told of the Berserkers' exploits, speaking of their ability to single-handedly decimate [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] cadres. They were fierce combatants, fast-moving and very quick in their attacks.<ref name="SW:GB DataBank">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' DataBank</ref>

[[Aron Peacebringer]] compared the [[Calian]] [[Ryastraad|Battle madness]] to "berserker rage."<ref name="MC54">[[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' (1977) 54]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Berserkers and advanced Berserkers appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They are the Wookiee civilization special units and are produced at Fortresses for a cost of 80 units of food and 35 units of [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]].
